sections.copy: Wake calm, clear, and already ahead. Claim your sunrise routine now for the launch price and own your first ninety minutes.
It is official, your seat is confirmed, and everything you need is already on its way to your inbox right now.

steps: Check your inbox for the welcome bonus and save it somewhere you will see it every single morning.
Watch your phone for a warm personal text from the founder and reply so we know you are truly here.
Open your very first ritual tonight and set one gentle alarm for the calm morning waiting ahead of you.

sections.copy: Welcome to your next chapter. We take that decision seriously, and starting tomorrow, so will you.
